summary: Successfully tested Route Sentinel changes: removed Emergent branding and added multi-step authentication support via preSteps
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/targets returns exactly 3 targets including demo-auth-form with auth_strategy='form'
✅ GET /api/config returns config with preSteps schema support in formLogin
✅ POST /api/config/validate accepts config with preSteps array in formLogin
✅ POST /api/monitor/run/demo-auth-form performs real Playwright form login (90s timeout) with auth_used=true
✅ Root HTML at / contains no 'Emergent', 'PostHog', or 'Oracle Health' references
✅ No floating badge button visible in bottom-right corner
✅ Targets page shows 3 target cards including authenticated target
✅ Target detail page /targets/demo-auth-form shows 'Authenticated' badges on runs
✅ Setup Guide shows 'Authenticated Monitoring (Form Login)' section with 7-step auth flow
✅ Setup Guide contains 'Multi-Step preSteps Reference' code block
✅ All main pages load correctly: Overview, Targets, Alerts, Config, Setup Guide
